LOGIN.TITLE: The virtual board that connects residents and services
LOGIN.SUBTITLE: Discover products and local services available inside your condominium. A simple way to connect who offers with who needs.
LOGIN.FEATURE_1: Haircuts, sweets, maintenance, pets and more
LOGIN.FEATURE_3: More convenience for people living in the condo
LOGIN.EXAMPLE_TEXT: One resident cuts hair, another sells sweets, another offers maintenance. With the board, everyone becomes visible to neighbors and closes more deals.
LOGIN.SIGN_IN_SUBTITLE: Access your account and see what is available in your condo.
LOGIN.CREATE_ACCOUNT_LINK: Do not have an account? Create one

REGISTER.TITLE: Create account
REGISTER.SUBTITLE_CREATE: Register your account to access your condominium board.
REGISTER.SUBTITLE_CONFIRM: Enter the code sent to your email.
REGISTER.ACCOUNT_CREATED: Account created. Check your email for the confirmation code.
REGISTER.EMAIL_CONFIRMED: Email confirmed. You can now log in.
REGISTER.PASSWORD_STRENGTH: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number and special character.
REGISTER.CODE_REQUIRED: Please enter the code sent to your email.

CONFIRM_EMAIL.TITLE: Confirm your email
CONFIRM_EMAIL.SUBTITLE: We sent a verification code to your email.
CONFIRM_EMAIL.SUCCESS: Email confirmed! You can now sign in.
CONFIRM_EMAIL.RESEND_SUCCESS: New code sent! Check your email.
CONFIRM_EMAIL.NOT_CONFIRMED_WARNING: Please confirm your email before signing in. Check the code sent to your inbox.

FORGOT_PASSWORD.TITLE: Forgot your password?
FORGOT_PASSWORD.SUBTITLE: Enter your email and we will send you a code to reset your password.
FORGOT_PASSWORD.RESET_SUBTITLE: Enter the code sent to {{email}} and choose a new password.
FORGOT_PASSWORD.CODE_REQUIRED: Please enter the code received by email.
FORGOT_PASSWORD.PASSWORD_STRENGTH: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number and special character.
FORGOT_PASSWORD.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Your password was successfully reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
FORGOT_PASSWORD.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Unable to process request. Please try again.

DASHBOARD.TITLE: Welcome to your workspace
DASHBOARD.SUBTITLE: Your assets and global style system are now active across the application.

PROVIDER.HERO_TITLE: Manage your services in the condominium
PROVIDER.HERO_SUBTITLE: Track your services, reviews, and booking requests in
PROVIDER.NO_SERVICES: You have not published any service yet.
PROVIDER.NO_SERVICES_HINT: Click "New service" to start appearing on the board.
PROVIDER.FORM_DAYS_REQUIRED: Configure at least one availability day.

CUSTOMER.NO_SERVICES_HINT: Try another filter or wait for new listings in your condo.
CUSTOMER.HERO_SUBTITLE: Find services and professionals in your condominium in
CUSTOMER.REVIEW_ERROR: Error submitting review. Please try again.

PROFILE.TITLE: My Profile
PROFILE.SUBTITLE: Manage your personal information, address and condominium.
PROFILE.ROLE_PROVIDER_DESC: I publish services on the board for other residents.
PROFILE.ROLE_CUSTOMER_DESC: I search and hire services from other residents.
PROFILE.ROLE_CHANGE_WARNING: Changing your profile will redirect you to the corresponding dashboard.
PROFILE.SECURITY_COGNITO_DESC: Your account is authenticated via AWS Cognito. Your credentials are managed securely.
PROFILE.SECURITY_PASSWORD_DESC: To change your password, access the AWS Cognito portal or use the 'Forgot password' option on the login screen.
PROFILE.SECURITY_PASSWORD_CHANGE_DESC: Enter your current password and choose a new one.
PROFILE.PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
PROFILE.PASSWORD_WRONG_CURRENT: Current password is incorrect. Please check and try again.
PROFILE.PASSWORD_INVALID: Invalid password. Use uppercase, lowercase, number and special character.
PROFILE.PASSWORD_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
PROFILE.GOOGLE_ACCOUNT_DESC: You signed in with Google. To change your password, visit your Google account settings.

FEEDBACK.NETWORK_ERROR: Unable to connect to the server.
FEEDBACK.INVALID_PASSWORD: Invalid password. Check uppercase, lowercase, number and special character requirements.
FEEDBACK.NOT_AUTHORIZED: You are not authorized for this action.

ONBOARDING.CONDO_TITLE: Your condo, connected in one place
ONBOARDING.CONDO_SUBTITLE: Set up your condominium address to activate a community board where residents can buy, sell, and share whatever they need.

ROLE.TITLE: Choose how you want to use the board
ROLE.SUBTITLE: Set your profile to access the best experience inside your condominium. You can buy, hire, sell, or promote services for other residents.

PROVIDER.TITLE: I want to promote and offer services
PROVIDER.SUBTITLE: Ideal for residents who want to promote services or sell products within the condominium.
PROVIDER.F1: Publish your services or products on the board
PROVIDER.F3: Receive contacts and opportunities more easily
PROVIDER.F4: Manage your listings in one place

CUSTOMER.TITLE: I want to find services and opportunities
CUSTOMER.SUBTITLE: Ideal for residents who want to find services, buy products, and browse condominium listings.
CUSTOMER.F2: Discover products and opportunities near you
CUSTOMER.F4: Keep everything organized in one place

ONBOARDING.CEP_INVALID: Please enter a valid ZIP code.

ANALYTICS.TITLE: Analytics
ANALYTICS.SELECT_SERVICE: Select a service to view analytics

STRIPE_CONNECT.STATUS_PENDING_DESC: Complete your registration to receive payments from your clients.

STRIPE_CONNECT.RETURN_SUCCESS: Registration submitted! Waiting for Stripe confirmation. Status will update shortly.
STRIPE_CONNECT.RETURN_REFRESH: Link expired. Click 'Continue registration' to generate a new link.

PAYMENT.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Your appointment has been paid successfully. The provider will be notified.
PAYMENT.VERIFY_ERROR: Could not confirm automatically. Please check your appointments.
PAYMENT.CANCEL_MESSAGE: The payment was cancelled. You can try again or contact the provider.
